name: Art Mooney
abstract: Arthur Joseph Mooney (February 11, 1911 – September 9, 1993) was an American singer and bandleader. His biggest hits were "I'm Looking Over a Four Leaf Clover" and "Baby Face" in 1948 and "Nuttin' For Christmas," with Barry Gordon, in 1955.

about_quotes.speaker: DeFranco Buddy
about_quotes.evidence: once in awhile they would invite my brother and I to sit in and play along with them.
about_quotes.doc_title: DeFranco Buddy — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
